[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 0010100 2
2 1010011 4
3 0100100 2
4 1111111 a
5 1111111 a
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 10 0010100 2 match 1
12 21 0011100 3
23 32 1010000 2
34 43 0110001 3
45 54 0101001 3
56 65 0101000 2
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0010000 1

02 20 0010100 2 match 1
13 31 0010011 3
24 42 0011100 3
35 53 1100011 4
46 64 0101100 3
57 75 1001011 4
60 06 0100100 2 match 3
71 17 0011011 4

36 63 0100000 1
47 74 0011001 3 match 0

61 16 0001100 2
72 27 1011000 3

15 51 0001011 3

37 73 1010011 4 match 2
